event_blocks.summary: The video commences with a game-style achievement notification, 'Achievement unlocked 100G - Watching Sidemen,' heralding a 'Sidemen Sunday' featuring a UK versus US calorie challenge where teams in Las Vegas and the UK compete to consume the most calories, with the narrator noting the typically higher caloric content of US food. A man in a black hoodie with a British flag icon is seen eating a sandwich, followed by a man in a white shirt with an American flag icon consuming a meal outdoors with beer. Another man in a black hoodie, also bearing a British flag icon, is situated in a room with brick walls and blue lighting. The scene shifts to a man in a white shirt with a green logo eating a burger and fries in a restaurant, while a man in a Pikachu hat and green sunglasses stands before a 'Caesars Sportsbook' sign, indicating a Las Vegas setting. A man riding a red scooter adds dynamism to the urban backdrop. A US team member checks in from Las Vegas, and the primary narrator, a man in a white t-shirt with an American flag icon, speaks from a hotel room with a city view, emphasizing the USA team's perspective on American food being more calorific, saltier, and larger than UK food. Another US team member, in a black jersey with Rasta stripes, is also seen in a hotel room. The video then transitions to a man in a black hoodie and beanie in a well-lit hotel room, introducing the calorie challenge and a 'day in the life' segment with a British accent. Subsequently, Simon, a man in a black hoodie with a British flag icon, is shown in a gaming setup, consuming a cheese and tomato toasty from Costa, with on-screen text displaying calorie counts. In contrast, a man in a white shirt with an American flag icon, speaking with an American accent, presents a 'healthy breakfast' featuring granola and cottage cheese (444 CALORIES), fruit cups (310 CALORIES), and a waffle with syrup and fruit (503 CALORIES). The final segment features a man in a white t-shirt with an 'OFF' logo, standing in a hotel room with a cityscape view, explaining in a British accent his tendency to eat burgers despite attempting healthy breakfasts, a pattern the calorie challenge accommodates.

raw_segments: The video opens with a black screen displaying a game-style achievement notification: 'Achievement unlocked 100G - Watching Sidemen,' as a male voice introduces "another Sidemen Sunday" featuring a "UK versus US calorie challenge." He explains that one team is in the USA (Las Vegas) and the other in the UK, aiming to see which team can eat the most calories, noting that "typically US food has more calories." The scene transitions to a man in a black hoodie eating a sandwich with a British flag icon, followed by a man in a white shirt with an American flag icon eating a meal with a beer outdoors. Another man in a black hoodie with a British flag icon is seen in a room with a brick wall and blue lighting. The video then shows a man in a white shirt with a green logo eating a burger in a restaurant, with a close-up of two burgers and fries. A man in a Pikachu hat and green sunglasses stands outdoors in front of a 'Caesars Sportsbook' sign, suggesting a Las Vegas location. A man riding a red scooter adds a dynamic element to the urban setting. A different male voice, identified as a US team member, checks in from "sunny Las Vegas." The primary narrator, a man in a white t-shirt with an American flag icon, is then seen speaking in a hotel room with a city view, reiterating his presence on the "USA team" and describing American food as "much more calorific," with "a lot of bloody salt," and "much larger" sizes compared to UK food. Another US team member, a man in a black jersey with red, yellow, and green stripes, is seen speaking in a hotel room. The final scene features a man in a black hoodie and beanie speaking in a well-lit hotel room, who offers a casual greeting: "Yo, what going? Your boy came to the S to the I." Throughout, background music plays, and flag icons denote national affiliations, integrating food, travel, and personal commentary.

The Man in black t-shirt concludes his segment in a blue-lit hallway, and another voice details calorie counts for a "Melbourne Sprite" and a "1200 calories for 12 minutes" challenge. event_blocks.summary: In a brightly lit airport baggage claim area, men engaged in lively discussion, with the Man in black hoodie with 'TELEVISION KILLS YOUR BRAIN' text interacting with the Man in black hoodie with British flag icon, and the Man in white bucket hat joining them, all while voices discussed calorie counts, referencing "nine in 120" and a jump from 9,300 to 10,000 due to alcohol, as a progress bar with chicken wing icons tracked the challenge. The group then faced the camera, and the Man in black hoodie with white fur-lined hood playfully gestured. A close-up of a sleeping man followed, with text overlaying 'FINAL CALORIE COUNT USA: 32,752 UK: 28,241', and a hoarse voice lamented, "I've just woken up in the morning. I didn't eat anything else last night. I fell straight asleep in a food coma. I feel terrible. Please no more calorie challenges," ending with a groan. The video transitioned to a stylized, neon-lit animated sequence featuring the 'SDMN' logo and 'TONE' against a brick wall with pink and blue lighting, and a chain-link 'S', accompanied by upbeat electronic music. This energetic music continued as a man in a white hoodie with a colorful graphic performed movements under blue and purple lighting, showing 'SDMN' on his socks. The scene shifted to a futuristic retail space with a runway, illuminated pedestals, and large screens displaying models, while men posed on a central stage under neon pink and cyan lights, with the 'SDMN' logo above and 'SIDEMEN.CLOTHING.COM' visible on the runway, before concluding with an 'EDIT BY @Z68VFX' credit and a black screen.
